<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Starting to add surface energy flux derivative Δρ_flux_h_tot_ΔT in surface_conditions.jl, so that it can be called in surface_temp.jl to calculate the surface temperature on sea ice implicitly.


## To-do
Check if the code compiles and runs.
title: Adding surface energy flux derivative calculation for sea ice model
